utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with costs: 1) health_coverage: explicitly states physical and mental health insurance with costs, including totals; satisfies. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents and photography equipment with costs and total property costs; satisfies. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with costs, including adventure activities and totals; satisfies. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services (professional liability, cyber security) with costs and total; satisfies. 5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual breakdowns; satisfies. All items fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each named plan in the final coverage plan to the closest exact name present in the ground-truth ratings. Only items that exactly appear in the ratings database are included with ratings. Items not present in the ground-truth (e.g., BerlinCare Basic, BudgetProtect Essentials, BackpackerSafe Basic, HealthCo Basic Cyber Security) are omitted from RATINGS because no rating exists. Mapped items: HealthFirst Standard Plan (mental health), VitalPlus Standard Coverage (property equipment upgrade listed), TravelFirst Standard Plan (travel upgrade), Adventure Travel Coverage (travel enhancement), SecureLife Basic Plan (professional liability under additional services).
